name: OTP Verification
subject: Your verification code
useCase: Send a one-time password code for account verification or login confirmation.
description: A concise OTP email with a dominant code block, expiry note, and security warning.
author: TemplateForge
text:
Hi {{first_name}},

Use this one-time password to continue:
{{otp_code}}

This code expires in {{expiry_minutes}} minutes.

If you did not request this code, you can ignore this message or visit {{support_url}}.
mjml:
<mjml>
  <mj-head>
    <mj-title>Your verification code</mj-title>
    <mj-preview>Your one-time password expires in {{expiry_minutes}} minutes.</mj-preview>
    <mj-attributes>
      <mj-all font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif" />
      <mj-text color="#172033" font-size="16px" line-height="24px" />
      <mj-section padding="0" />
    </mj-attributes>
  </mj-head>
  <mj-body background-color="#f4f7fb" width="600px">
    <mj-section padding="32px 20px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text align="center" color="#647084" font-size="13px" font-weight="700" letter-spacing="1.4px" text-transform="uppercase">
          TemplateForge
        </mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    <mj-section background-color="#ffffff" border-radius="16px" padding="0 0 8px 0">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text align="center" color="#111827" font-size="28px" font-weight="700" line-height="34px" padding="40px 32px 8px">
          Your verification code
        </mj-text>
        <mj-text align="center" color="#4b5870" padding="0 36px 28px">
          Hi {{first_name}}, use this code to finish signing in or confirming your account action.
        </mj-text>
        <mj-text align="center" background-color="#eef4ff" color="#0f3f8f" font-size="36px" font-weight="800" letter-spacing="8px" line-height="44px" padding="24px 20px">
          {{otp_code}}
        </mj-text>
        <mj-text align="center" color="#334155" font-size="15px" font-weight="600" padding="28px 32px 4px">
          This code expires in {{expiry_minutes}} minutes.
        </mj-text>
        <mj-text align="center" color="#667085" font-size="14px" line-height="22px" padding="0 36px 32px">
          If you did not request this code, you can ignore this email or get help at {{support_url}}.
        </mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
    <mj-section padding="24px 20px 40px">
      <mj-column>
        <mj-text align="center" color="#8a94a6" font-size="12px" line-height="18px">
          This is a transactional security message.
        </mj-text>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
  </mj-body>
</mjml>
